description_long: This is a grand piano with a dark wooden exterior, featuring a classic, angular design and a raised lid exposing the golden strings and internal structure. The keyboard consists of alternating black and white keys, and a music stand with sheet music is positioned above the keys. Three gold-colored pedals are visible beneath the keyboard, supported by sturdy wooden legs. The lid is propped open, revealing the piano's harp and string arrangement, while the body has a blocky, geometric style reminiscent of voxel art. The surface appears matte with a slightly rough wood grain texture. The piano is substantial in size and would be a prominent feature in any urban park, plaza, or public space.
description: A dark wooden grand piano with a raised lid, visible strings, a music stand, and three gold pedals. The design is blocky and geometric, with a matte, wood-textured finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full keyboard, music stand with sheet music, and all three pedals.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the open lid, internal strings, and the music stand from the side.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the open lid and the exposed golden strings inside the piano.
description_view_3: Side view showing the profile of the piano, the music stand, and the open lid's structure.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard layout with 52 white keys and 36 black keys arranged in alternating groups, no missing or split keys.
